# UC-13.1.55 · Prometheus Head Series and Chunks Approaching Limit

> **Criticality:** Medium &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Capacity, Performance &middot; **Status:** Draft

*We read the forwarder and buffer logs for stress and give-ups so we see log loss risk before disks or patience run out.*

---

## Description

Large heads increase memory pressure and OOM risk during compactions.

## Value

Gives capacity owners lead time to shard or drop high-cardinality metrics.

## Implementation

Tune thresholds to your `storage.tsdb.max-head-series` configuration.

## SPL

```spl
| mstats latest(_value) AS head_series WHERE index=prometheus metric_name="prometheus_tsdb_head_series" span=5m BY instance
| where head_series > 1500000
| sort - head_series
```

## Visualization

Area chart (head series), Gauge vs limit.

## Known False Positives

Noisy periods after retention, target, or scrape changes. We compare with the Grafana or Prometheus view for the same minutes.

## References

- [Prometheus documentation — monitoring Prometheus](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/troubleshooting/)
- [Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector](https://docs.splunk.com/observability/en/gdi/opentelemetry/opentelemetry.html)
